title: lastrea caduca
intro: Lastrea caduca, also known as the caduca fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is a group of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Lastrea caduca include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and cuts. The herbal preparations of Lastrea caduca can be made into tea, tinctures, or poultices, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
